body: We need something like GitHub Copilot but aware of our ABAP and CAP stacks. Embed a copilot panel that suggests BTP best practices on each pull request. Upvoted heavily on our internal channel.

New hires struggle to find the right SAP documentation during onboarding. An AI assistant that walks them through role-based learning paths would save weeks. Several designers echoed this in comments.

Community asks for a single place to discover which AI missions are active, who owns them, and which prototypes are safe to extend. Bonus if it surfaces related market trends when proposing a new mission.

Teams prototype RAG pipelines without a shared eval harness. A lightweight mission to standardize retrieval metrics and golden Q&A sets for internal doc corpora would accelerate every follow-on experiment.
